pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at some discrepancies from our recent audit at the Rotterdam facility. We're seeing some mismatches between our WMS (Warehouse Management System) and the actual physical counts for some of our high-value electronic components. Can you look at these numbers and help me figure out what might be causing these small, recurring gaps?

Component ID | WMS Count | Physical Count | Discrepancy
EC-9902 (Capacitors) | 1,450 | 1,442 | -8
EC-4410 (Resistors) | 12,200 | 12,185 | -15
EC-1105 (Microchips) | 850 | 844 | -6
EC-0032 (Sensors) | 430 | 428 | -2

They all seem to be just a few units off. It's not enough to stop operations, but it's happening every month. Any ideas on what the main culprits usually are in these types of setups?
pool.message:
